As a professional stair and railing contractor in Vancouver and surrounding areas, we design, fabricate, and install our customers' projects with the highest quality and competitive prices. We have extended our services to more cities. In addition to Vancouver, we are proud to offer our services to the residents of Bowen Island, Burnaby, New Westminster, Coquitlam, Whistler, Pemberton, and Squamish, Langley, and Richmond now.

The Best Stair and Railing Contractor in Vancouver, BC

RAILINGS & GATES IN VANCOUVER, BC

Cypress Railings & Gates proudly serves a diverse clientele, including homeowners, businesses, industries, and construction contractors. Our projects range from small residential renovations to large-scale commercial strata developments and high-rise buildings. Regardless of your budget or project size, you can rely on the Cypress Railings team for exceptional workmanship. Our service area includes North Vancouver, West Vancouver, Burnaby, Surrey, New Westminster, Vancouver, Richmond, Bowen Island, Squamish, Langley and Coquitlam.

Our services include but are not limited to:

  • Glass railing
  • Metal railings
  • Wood railings
  • Stainless steel railings
  • Stair railing
  • Metal gates
  • Deck railing
  • Balcony railing
  • Composite fences
  • Straight Stairs
  • Spiral staircases
  • Floating Stairs
  • Handrails
  • Driveway gates
  • Metal fencing
  • Full privacy fences
  • Steel structure
  • Metal canopy
  • Aluminum fencing
  • Aluminum railing
  • Chain link fence
  • Metal Staircases

RAILINGS & GATES IN VANCOUVER, BC

GLASS RAILINGS

Our elegant and sophisticated glass railings offer a minimal, clean, and modern design with transparency and functionality to provide an interrupted view of the sunset on your patio or watch your kids playing together on the second floor of your home. Your residence deserves a new touch of class, and glass railings that fit perfection are absolutely guaranteed to deliver on that front.

About Company

Cypress Railings & Gates, a professional stair and railings company in Vancouver & surrounding areas, offers residential & commercial services including custom design, fabrication & installation of gates, fences, stairs & railings at reasonable prices and of the highest quality.
